flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Wilmington College fell 18% between 2006 and 2009 (57.9% → 47.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Wilmington College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.7k → $24.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Wilmington College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (46.3% → 38.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Wilmington College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.8k → $32.1k).
